threat_reasoning: Base 0 + LOLBin abuse (vssadmin delete) (+25) + obfuscated PowerShell parent command line (+25) + AbuseIPDB destination IP score of 90 (+30) + high-frequency/network activity to domain registered under 30 days (+25) = 105, capped at 100. The activity matches classic ransomware behavior of inhibiting recovery followed by external C2 communication.
